summary: A single-story rectangular L-shaped courtyard building with two tall corner towers and a raised dark roof path forming an inner walkway. Exterior walls are layered horizontally with brick, wood planks, stone-like trim and white vertical corner/column accents. Two square towers rise above the roof with overhanging slab caps and glow at their tops.

shape.overall_form: L-shaped single-block-thick exterior wall enclosing an open central courtyard with roofed walkway along the inner perimeter and two corner towers
shape.symmetry: approximately bilateral along the long axis but with asymmetry due to tower placement and the L-shape

materials.name: fence
materials.role: decorative crenellation on inner roof edge (uncertain)

elements: outer walls with horizontal layered bands (stone base, brick, wood, stone/white trim)
raised dark slab roof/path forming an L-shaped covered walkway
two tall square towers with slab caps and glowstone on top
small window openings or glass panes on tower faces
rebuild_hints: Use a 1-block-thick exterior wall forming an L-shaped enclosure; leave interior as open courtyard.
Wall composition from bottom up: stonebrick base (1-2 blocks), brick band, wood plank band, brick band, white trim (quartz or white blocks) vertical columns at intervals.

Create two square towers (~3x3) rising above the wall at inner-corner positions, with stonebrick corner trim, brick faces with small glass insets, and overhanging slab_stone caps with a glow source centered.

Lay a continuous dark slab (nether-like dark wood or nether brick slabs) roof/path 1 slab thick across the top of the wall where shown, stepping down along the L to form a walkway; add crenellations of white blocks along the roof edge.
Place white block border (single blocks) around the exterior ground perimeter as shown to mark the plot.
uncertainties: Exact block IDs for 'white' accents: appears to be quartz or white concrete but not certain.
Whether dark roof slabs are nether brick slabs or dark wood slabs; chosen as slab_wood with high confidence but could be nether_brick.
Ground surface inside courtyard appears as dirt/terracotta; exact material uncertain.
Fence-like decorative pieces along inner roof edge are ambiguous (could be stairs, fences, or slabs).
Precise internal features inside towers and courtyard (doors, stairs) are not visible.
